description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three ubuntu-20.04 jobs for different Couchbase server versions (6.6.0, 6.0.3, and 6.5.1), each setting up a Ruby environment, installing dependencies, initializing Couchbase, compiling an extension, checking the cluster, and running tests with a 15-minute timeout. If tests fail, display any core dumps.
